topics.label: The 8 Commands
topics.description: > < + - . , [ ] — move pointer, increment/decrement, I/O, and loops. That's the entire language.

topics.label: Memory Model
topics.description: Array of 30,000 cells initialized to 0 with a movable pointer. Each cell holds a byte.

topics.label: Hello World
topics.description: Write your first program — outputting ASCII characters by incrementing cells.

topics.label: Loops & Patterns
topics.description: [ and ] create while loops. Common patterns: zeroing cells, copying, and multiplication.

topics.label: Algorithms
topics.description: Addition, multiplication, conditional logic, and basic I/O programs.

topics.label: Writing an Interpreter
topics.description: Implement a Brainfuck interpreter — a great exercise in parsing and execution.
